title: LEVEL UP: UNITY ROADMAP

authority.content: input/Prompt.md is the sole content source. Preserve the Vietnamese roadmap structure and slide count.
authority.appearance: User prompt specifies a modern dark-mode neon training deck; SUN.STUDIO brand pack supplies local fonts, logo, Dio character, and published diagram/card resources.

visual_needs: Dark neon game UI cover with Unity/gamepad motif
Month 2 cross-functional workflow and weekly milestones
Profile cards for mentor, GD, artist, QA, PM and HR
Minimal Q&A and thank-you closing slides
fonts: Space Grotesk / Lexend style fallback via system sans-serif stack
Inter / DM Sans style fallback via system sans-serif stack
effects: CSS-only isometric objects and icon masks
unsupported_effects: No real Unity 3D model asset is provided; cover uses local Unity/gamepad iconography and CSS isometric geometry instead.
approvals: Approve dark-neon visual direction as an intentional appearance override from the default light SUN.STUDIO look.
Approve HTML as the requested first delivery format; PPTX/PDF can be generated as a follow-up if needed.
